introduce benchmark and switch to go-json

exporter/prometheus: Remove usage of hardcoded ports in tests (#40411)

#### Description

Fixes #38925 
Fixes #40327 

Instead of using hardcoded ports, we're calling
`testutil.GetAvailableLocalAddress()` instead

Signed-off-by: Arthur Silva Sens <arthursens2005@gmail.com>

initial commit for unmarshaller of CloudTrail log events

This changeset follows the same structure as vpc flow log, s3 access log
and subscription filter logs but now dedicated to CloudTrail log events.

The log samples were taken from
https://docs.aws.amazon.com/awscloudtrail/latest/userguide/cloudtrail-log-file-examples.html#cloudtrail-log-file-examples-section.

This unmarshaller is tested against startInstances and createUser events
and supports compressed messages.

It takes in a compressed JSON object of `{"Records": []}` where the
array contains individual objects.

The outcome is grouped by account id, and region id.

Bump prometheus to 0.304.1 (#40397)

#### Description
Bumps prometheus/prometheus to 0.304.1

---------

Signed-off-by: Arthur Silva Sens <arthursens2005@gmail.com>

azuremonitorexporter: Fix misspellings in documentation regarding exception_events_enabled (#40392)

#### Description

Fix misspellings in documentation regarding `exception_events_enabled`,
and try to make the text a bit more readable.

It looks as though the code uses `events` plural, so the documentation
using `event` may be misleading.

(unless I am misreading the code ;) )

simplify code to assume compressed and same id/region

also refactor test code to reuse what the collector provides

permissions to the ClusterRole
